public interface IDynamicFilter : IBaseFilter

The IDynamicFilter type exposes the following members.

Properties
  NameDescription
Delimiter
Returns the delimiter string that can be used to join multiple filter values. If this is null, filter values are mutually exclusive and cannot be combined.
Top
Methods
  NameDescription
GetClausesAsync
Returns the clauses to apply to the query.
